ItacAcademyItem.Name: Ebbri (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: According to to Francesco Saverio Quadrio and Alessio Narbone the Ebbri academy was founded in 1650 . Ignazio Avolio dates the foundation of the Ebbri academy to 1629. In 1753 the Ebbri academy was replaced by the Aretusei academy
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
